fields.asset_class: Asset class when available in the daily context.
fields.context_as_of: Daily context timestamp or date when available.
fields.daily_context_present: Whether a local daily context file was present at build time.
fields.quality_status: Public quality-state summary derived from context metadata.
fields.sitemap_lastmod: Last modification date from the stock sitemap.
fields.source_count: Count of source-manifest entries when exposed in metadata.
